seo.title: Lyric Video Templates — AI Visual Styles for Your Song, Free
seo.description: Get lyric video styles that match your song. Upload audio, AI transcribes lyrics, syncs to the beat, and generates mood-driven visuals. Preview and export free — no subscription.

hero.badge: Lyric video templates — AI-generated, matched to your song
hero.subhead: Upload your song or paste a link. AI auto-transcribes the lyrics, syncs every line to the beat, and generates visual styles driven by the song's mood — not generic templates. Preview the result, then export — free, no subscription needed.
hero.primaryCta: Try Templates with My Song — Free

trust: Export free, no subscription or credit card

styles.title: Lyric Video Templates Matched to Your Song
styles.subtitle: Start from flexible visual directions instead of a fixed gallery: AI adapts the lyric layout, motion, and background mood to the track.

items.name: Minimal lyric layout
items.description: Clean type, simple motion, and generous spacing for acoustic songs, demos, and lyric-first releases.

items.name: Vertical short-form style
items.description: Large readable lyrics and phone-safe composition for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts clips.

items.name: Mood visualizer
items.description: Generated backgrounds follow the energy and emotion of the song while the lyrics stay clear.

items.name: YouTube release layout
items.description: A wider 16:9 presentation with room for full-song pacing, intro moments, and readable choruses.

items.name: Performance promo style
items.description: More movement and visual weight for hooks, launch clips, and artist promo moments.

items.name: Square feed cut
items.description: Balanced 1:1 framing for posts where the lyric has to stay readable in a tighter canvas.

howItWorks.title: How Lyric Video Templates Work on LyricsVideo.ai

steps.title: Upload your song
steps.description: Drop an MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC, or OGG file — or paste a link. No account needed to start, and no manual lyric typing required. The AI reads your song's mood to match the right visual style — you don't browse a generic template gallery.

steps.title: AI transcribes and generates visuals
steps.description: AI transcribes lyrics from the audio automatically and syncs every line to the beat — in 50+ languages. Click any line to edit. Visual styles are generated to match the song's energy, genre, and mood.

steps.title: Preview and export
steps.description: Watch the full lyric video with the matched visual style before publishing. Confirm the lyrics are readable and the look fits the song, then export in 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok and Reels, or 1:1 for feed posts. Free to export, no subscription required.

whyChoose.title: Why Get Lyric Video Templates on LyricsVideo.ai
whyChoose.description: Most lyric video template tools give you a gallery of generic backgrounds and expect you to type lyrics on top. LyricsVideo.ai starts from your song — AI transcribes the lyrics, syncs them, and generates visuals that actually match the music.

highlight.title: Visuals matched to your song, not picked from a gallery
highlight.description: The AI reads the mood, energy, and genre of your song and generates matching visual styles. A ballad gets a different look than a rap hook — automatically.

cards.title: Template direction starts from the track
cards.description: The song's energy and genre shape the layout direction before you spend time comparing looks that were never meant for your music.

cards.title: Mood-driven, not random
cards.description: Visual styles are generated from the song's mood and energy, not picked randomly from a template gallery. Every lyric video looks like it belongs to the track.

cards.title: Consistent release look
cards.description: Use the same visual direction across a full lyric video, hook clip, and feed post so the release feels like one campaign.

items.question: Are lyric video templates free?
items.answer: Yes. Sign up, get free credits, and export your lyric video with matched visual styles — no subscription required, no credit card needed.

items.question: Do I need to choose a template manually?
items.answer: No. Upload your song and AI generates visual styles matched to the mood and energy of your music. You preview the result and export — no manual template browsing.

items.question: Do I need to type the lyrics myself?
items.answer: No. Upload your audio and the AI transcribes every lyric line automatically, in 50+ languages. Click any line to edit if needed.

items.question: Will the visual style match my song's genre?
items.answer: Yes. The AI reads the mood, energy, and themes of your song and generates matching visuals. A soft ballad gets a different look than an energetic hook.

items.question: Can I use exported lyric videos commercially?
items.answer: Yes — your exports are yours, including for monetized channels and paid releases. Make sure you have rights to the music you upload.

items.question: What formats can I export in?
items.answer: 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts, or 1:1 for feed posts. All formats from one upload.

useCases.title: Genre-matched aesthetics

bottomCta.title: Your song sets the mood. AI matches the visuals.
bottomCta.description: Upload your track, let AI handle the lyrics and visual style, and export a finished lyric video — free, no subscription needed.
